name: iam-api-tests
description: Postman / Newman API tests for IAM Server

scripts.test:local: newman run iam-server.postman_collection.json -e iam-local.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report.html
scripts.test:docker: newman run iam-server.postman_collection.json -e iam-docker.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report-docker.html
scripts.test:ci: newman run iam-server.postman_collection.json -e iam-local.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export results/junit.xml --bail
